class.name: GaussianSplatRenderer
class.brief_description: RefCounted renderer backend used to draw Gaussian splat datasets.
class.description: GaussianSplatRenderer owns the GPU-side pipeline for culling, sorting, and rasterizing Gaussian splats. It is typically created by scene integration code and configured with GaussianData resources and render settings. Supports tile-based rasterization, multiple sorting algorithms (bitonic, radix, onesweep), painterly post-processing, debug overlays, and interactive visual effects.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes the GPU rendering pipeline, creating shader programs, compute pipelines, and GPU buffers. Must be called before the first render frame.

method.name: set_gaussian_data
method.description: Assigns the Gaussian splat data resource to render. Returns [constant OK] on success. Triggers GPU buffer allocation and upload.

method.name: get_gaussian_data
method.description: Returns the currently assigned GaussianData resource, or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: set_painterly_material
method.description: Assigns a PainterlyMaterial resource that configures brush textures and stylization parameters for painterly post-processing.

method.name: get_painterly_material
method.description: Returns the currently assigned PainterlyMaterial resource, or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: force_sort_for_view
method.description: Forces an immediate depth sort using the provided camera [param camera_transform]. Useful for ensuring correct draw order after teleporting the camera.

method.name: set_render_mode
method.description: Sets the rendering mode. Use [constant MODE_3D] for standard 3D ellipsoid rendering, [constant MODE_2D] for surfel discs, or [constant MODE_HYBRID] for automatic selection based on splat data.

method.name: get_render_mode
method.description: Returns the current rendering mode.

method.name: set_opacity_multiplier
method.description: Sets a global opacity multiplier applied to all splats during rendering. Range is 0.0 to 1.0.

method.name: get_opacity_multiplier
method.description: Returns the current global opacity multiplier.

method.name: set_static_sort_cache_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables caching of depth sort results for static scenes. When the camera has not moved, the cached sort order is reused to save GPU time.

method.name: is_static_sort_cache_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the static sort cache is enabled.

method.name: set_cached_render_reuse_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables reuse of the previous frame's render output when the scene is unchanged. Reduces GPU load for static viewpoints.

method.name: is_cached_render_reuse_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if cached render reuse is enabled.

method.name: set_lod_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables level-of-detail culling. When enabled, small or distant splats are progressively discarded.

method.name: get_lod_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if LOD culling is enabled.

method.name: set_lod_bias
method.description: Sets the LOD bias multiplier. Higher values keep more splats visible at greater distances. Range is typically 0.01 to 8.0.

method.name: get_lod_bias
method.description: Returns the current LOD bias multiplier.

method.name: set_lod_min_screen_size
method.description: Sets the minimum projected screen size in pixels. Splats smaller than this threshold are culled.

method.name: get_lod_min_screen_size
method.description: Returns the minimum screen size threshold in pixels.

method.name: set_lod_max_distance
method.description: Sets the maximum distance from the camera at which splats are rendered. Splats beyond this distance are culled.

method.name: get_lod_max_distance
method.description: Returns the maximum render distance.

method.name: set_importance_cull_threshold
method.description: Sets the importance culling threshold (0.0 to 1.0). Splats with an importance value below this are discarded. Lower values preserve more detail.

method.name: get_importance_cull_threshold
method.description: Returns the current importance culling threshold.

method.name: set_cull_radius_multiplier
method.description: Sets the multiplier for splat bounding radius during frustum culling. Higher values are more conservative, keeping more splats near frustum edges.

method.name: get_cull_radius_multiplier
method.description: Returns the current cull radius multiplier.

method.name: set_cull_frustum_plane_slack
method.description: Sets the slack added to frustum planes during culling. Higher values extend the effective frustum to reduce popping artifacts at screen edges.

method.name: get_cull_frustum_plane_slack
method.description: Returns the current frustum plane slack.

method.name: set_cull_near_tolerance
method.description: Sets the near-plane culling tolerance. Splats within this tolerance of the near plane are preserved.

method.name: get_cull_near_tolerance
method.description: Returns the current near-plane culling tolerance.

method.name: set_cull_far_tolerance
method.description: Sets the far-plane culling tolerance. Splats within this tolerance of the far plane are preserved.

method.name: get_cull_far_tolerance
method.description: Returns the current far-plane culling tolerance.

method.name: set_tiny_splat_screen_radius
method.description: Sets the screen-space radius threshold below which splats are considered too small to render and are culled.

method.name: get_tiny_splat_screen_radius
method.description: Returns the tiny splat screen radius threshold in pixels.

method.name: set_opacity_aware_culling
method.description: Enables or disables opacity-aware culling. When enabled, nearly transparent splats are culled earlier.

method.name: is_opacity_aware_culling
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if opacity-aware culling is enabled.

method.name: set_visibility_threshold
method.description: Sets the visibility threshold for opacity-aware culling. Splats with opacity below this value are discarded.

method.name: get_visibility_threshold
method.description: Returns the current visibility threshold.

method.name: set_distance_cull_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables progressive distance-based culling. When enabled, an increasing fraction of splats are culled as distance from camera grows.

method.name: is_distance_cull_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if distance-based culling is enabled.

method.name: set_distance_cull_start
method.description: Sets the distance at which progressive distance culling begins. Splats closer than this are not affected.

method.name: get_distance_cull_start
method.description: Returns the distance cull start value.

method.name: set_distance_cull_max_rate
method.description: Sets the maximum cull rate at the far end of the distance cull range. A value of 1.0 means all splats are culled at maximum distance.

method.name: get_distance_cull_max_rate
method.description: Returns the maximum distance cull rate.

method.name: set_overflow_autotune_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables automatic tuning of tile overflow limits based on runtime performance.

method.name: is_overflow_autotune_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if overflow auto-tuning is enabled.

method.name: set_max_splats
method.description: Sets the hard limit on the number of visible splats per frame. Excess splats are culled by importance.

method.name: get_max_splats
method.description: Returns the current maximum splat count limit.

method.name: set_frustum_culling
method.description: Enables or disables frustum culling. When enabled, splats outside the camera frustum are discarded before sorting.

method.name: get_frustum_culling
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if frustum culling is enabled.

method.name: set_painterly_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables the painterly post-processing pass. When enabled, rendered splats receive stylized brush-stroke effects.

method.name: get_painterly_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if painterly rendering is enabled.

method.name: set_painterly_low_end_mode
method.description: Enables or disables the low-end painterly mode that uses cheaper shader variants for reduced GPU cost.

method.name: get_painterly_low_end_mode
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if low-end painterly mode is active.

method.name: set_painterly_enable_strokes
method.description: Enables or disables the brush stroke overlay pass in painterly rendering.

method.name: get_painterly_enable_strokes
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the brush stroke overlay is enabled.

method.name: set_painterly_internal_scale
method.description: Sets the internal render resolution scale for the painterly pass. Lower values reduce GPU cost at the expense of detail. Range is 0.25 to 1.0.

method.name: get_painterly_internal_scale
method.description: Returns the current painterly internal resolution scale.

method.name: set_painterly_edge_threshold
method.description: Sets the edge detection sensitivity for painterly stroke placement. Higher values produce fewer detected edges.

method.name: get_painterly_edge_threshold
method.description: Returns the current painterly edge threshold.

method.name: set_painterly_edge_intensity
method.description: Sets the intensity of edge-line rendering in the painterly pass. Higher values produce darker, more visible edge lines.

method.name: get_painterly_edge_intensity
method.description: Returns the current painterly edge intensity.

method.name: set_painterly_stroke_length
method.description: Sets the length of brush strokes in pixels for the painterly overlay.

method.name: get_painterly_stroke_length
method.description: Returns the current painterly stroke length in pixels.

method.name: set_painterly_stroke_opacity
method.description: Sets the opacity of brush strokes in the painterly overlay. Range is 0.0 to 1.0.

method.name: get_painterly_stroke_opacity
method.description: Returns the current painterly stroke opacity.

method.name: set_painterly_gamma
method.description: Sets the gamma correction value for the painterly output. Used to match the stylized look to the scene's color space.

method.name: get_painterly_gamma
method.description: Returns the current painterly gamma value.

method.name: set_quality_preset
method.description: Applies a named quality preset that configures multiple rendering parameters at once. Accepted values are [code]"ultra"[/code], [code]"high"[/code], [code]"medium"[/code], and [code]"low"[/code].

method.name: get_quality_preset
method.description: Returns the name of the current quality preset ([code]"ultra"[/code], [code]"high"[/code], [code]"medium"[/code], or [code]"low"[/code]).

method.name: set_interactive_state
method.description: Sets the interactive visual state. Controls editor feedback effects such as hover highlighting and selection outlines.

method.name: get_interactive_state
method.description: Returns the current interactive state.

method.name: enable_highlight_effect
method.description: Applies a highlight tint effect over all rendered splats using the given [param color]. Commonly used for hover feedback in the editor.

method.name: enable_outline_effect
method.description: Applies an outline effect around the splat volume with the given [param color] and [param width]. Commonly used for selection feedback.

method.name: remove_visual_effects
method.description: Removes all active visual effects (highlight, outline) from this renderer instance.

method.name: get_render_stats
method.description: Returns a dictionary of per-frame rendering performance statistics including splat counts, sort timing, and GPU utilization metrics.

method.name: get_binning_debug_counters
method.description: Returns a dictionary of tile binning diagnostic counters. Includes per-tile splat counts, overflow statistics, and bin utilization data.

method.name: benchmark_sorting_performance
method.description: Runs an internal sorting performance benchmark and logs the results. Tests all available sorting algorithms with the current dataset.

method.name: run_sort_benchmark
method.description: Runs sorting benchmarks for each dataset size in [param sizes] and returns an array of result dictionaries containing timing data for each algorithm.

method.name: get_last_sort_metrics
method.description: Returns a dictionary with metrics from the most recent depth sort pass, including algorithm used, element count, and timing.

method.name: get_sort_metrics_history
method.description: Returns an array of recent sort metric dictionaries, one per frame. The history length is controlled by project settings.

method.name: get_sort_time_ms
method.description: Returns the GPU time spent on sorting in the most recent frame, measured in milliseconds.

method.name: get_render_time_ms
method.description: Returns the GPU time spent on the full render pass in the most recent frame, measured in milliseconds.

method.name: get_overflow_tile_count
method.description: Returns the number of tiles that overflowed their splat capacity in the most recent frame.

method.name: get_clamped_records
method.description: Returns the number of splat records that were clamped due to per-tile capacity limits in the most recent frame.

method.name: get_aggregated_count
method.description: Returns the total aggregated splat count across all tiles in the most recent frame.

method.name: get_overflow_stats
method.description: Returns a dictionary with tile overflow statistics from the most recent frame, including overflow tile count, clamped records, and aggregated totals.

method.name: get_visible_splat_count
method.description: Returns the number of splats that passed culling and were rendered in the most recent frame.

method.name: was_last_viewport_copy_successful
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the most recent viewport texture copy operation completed without errors.

method.name: get_last_viewport_copy_source_size
method.description: Returns the source texture size of the most recent viewport copy operation.

method.name: get_last_viewport_copy_dest_size
method.description: Returns the destination texture size of the most recent viewport copy operation.

method.name: get_pipeline_trace_snapshot
method.description: Returns a dictionary snapshot of the current pipeline trace state when pipeline tracing is enabled. Contains timing and state data for each pipeline stage.

method.name: get_pipeline_trace_json
method.description: Returns the current pipeline trace data formatted as a JSON string.

method.name: dump_pipeline_trace_to_file
method.description: Writes the current pipeline trace data to a file at [param path] in JSON format. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: set_debug_show_tile_grid
method.description: Enables or disables the tile grid debug overlay, showing tile boundaries over the rendered output.

method.name: is_debug_show_tile_grid
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the tile grid overlay is visible.

method.name: set_debug_show_density_heatmap
method.description: Enables or disables the density heatmap overlay, visualizing per-tile splat density as a color gradient.

method.name: is_debug_show_density_heatmap
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the density heatmap overlay is visible.

method.name: set_debug_show_performance_hud
method.description: Enables or disables the performance HUD overlay displaying frame timing, splat counts, and sort metrics.

method.name: is_debug_show_performance_hud
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the performance HUD is visible.

method.name: set_debug_show_residency_hud
method.description: Enables or disables the residency HUD overlay showing GPU memory and streaming state.

method.name: is_debug_show_residency_hud
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the residency HUD is visible.

method.name: set_debug_show_tile_bounds
method.description: Enables or disables the tile bounds debug overlay.

method.name: get_debug_show_tile_bounds
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the tile bounds overlay is visible.

method.name: set_debug_show_splat_coverage
method.description: Enables or disables the splat coverage debug overlay, highlighting screen areas covered by splat contributions.

method.name: get_debug_show_splat_coverage
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the splat coverage overlay is visible.

method.name: set_debug_show_overflow_tiles
method.description: Enables or disables highlighting of tiles that exceeded their splat capacity.

method.name: get_debug_show_overflow_tiles
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if overflow tile highlighting is visible.

method.name: set_debug_show_projection_issues
method.description: Enables or disables highlighting of splats with projection anomalies (e.g., behind-camera or degenerate covariance).

method.name: get_debug_show_projection_issues
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if projection issue highlighting is visible.

method.name: set_debug_show_white_albedo
method.description: Enables or disables overriding all splat colors with white, useful for inspecting geometry without color influence.

method.name: get_debug_show_white_albedo
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if white albedo override is active.

method.name: set_debug_show_shadow_opacity
method.description: Enables or disables visualization of the shadow opacity channel as a grayscale overlay.

method.name: get_debug_show_shadow_opacity
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if shadow opacity visualization is active.

method.name: set_debug_show_device_boundaries
method.description: Enables or disables visualization of GPU device submission boundaries for multi-device debugging.

method.name: is_debug_show_device_boundaries
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if device boundary visualization is active.

method.name: set_debug_show_texture_states
method.description: Enables or disables visualization of internal texture states for diagnosing resource lifecycle issues.

method.name: is_debug_show_texture_states
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if texture state visualization is active.

method.name: set_debug_compute_raster_policy
method.description: Overrides the compute rasterization policy for debugging. Use 0 for default automatic selection, 1 to force on, or 2 to force off.

method.name: get_debug_compute_raster_policy
method.description: Returns the current compute rasterization policy override.

method.name: set_debug_dump_gpu_counters
method.description: Enables or disables dumping of GPU performance counter values to the log each frame.

method.name: get_debug_dump_gpu_counters
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if GPU counter dumping is enabled.

method.name: set_debug_binning_counters_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables collection of tile binning diagnostic counters. Has a small GPU cost when enabled.

method.name: get_debug_binning_counters_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if binning counter collection is enabled.

method.name: set_debug_pipeline_trace_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables pipeline trace recording, capturing per-stage timing and state data for performance analysis.

method.name: get_debug_pipeline_trace_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if pipeline trace recording is enabled.

method.name: set_debug_state_guardrails_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables runtime state guardrail checks that validate pipeline invariants. Useful for catching rendering state bugs.

method.name: get_debug_state_guardrails_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if state guardrails are enabled.

method.name: set_debug_cull_guardrails_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables culling guardrail checks that validate splat counts before and after culling stages.

method.name: get_debug_cull_guardrails_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if culling guardrails are enabled.

method.name: set_debug_splat_audit_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables per-frame splat data auditing that reads back and validates GPU buffer contents.

method.name: get_debug_splat_audit_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if splat auditing is enabled.

method.name: set_debug_splat_audit_sample_count
method.description: Sets the number of splats to sample during each audit pass. Higher values increase diagnostic coverage but cost more GPU time.

method.name: get_debug_splat_audit_sample_count
method.description: Returns the current splat audit sample count.

method.name: set_debug_overlay_opacity
method.description: Sets the opacity of debug overlay visualizations. Range is 0.0 (fully transparent) to 1.0 (fully opaque).

method.name: get_debug_overlay_opacity
method.description: Returns the current debug overlay opacity.

method.name: set_solid_coverage_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables solid coverage mode, which raises the minimum alpha of accumulated splat contributions to create a more opaque appearance.

method.name: is_solid_coverage_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if solid coverage mode is enabled.

method.name: set_solid_coverage_alpha_floor
method.description: Sets the minimum alpha floor for solid coverage mode. Pixels with accumulated alpha above this threshold are treated as fully opaque.

method.name: get_solid_coverage_alpha_floor
method.description: Returns the current solid coverage alpha floor.

method.name: set_debug_show_resolve_input
method.description: Enables or disables visualization of the resolve pass input texture for diagnosing compositing issues.

method.name: get_debug_show_resolve_input
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if resolve input visualization is active.

method.name: set_debug_show_resolve_output
method.description: Enables or disables visualization of the resolve pass output texture for diagnosing compositing issues.

method.name: get_debug_show_resolve_output
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if resolve output visualization is active.

method.name: reload_pipeline_feature_set
method.description: Reloads the pipeline feature set configuration from project settings, updating which GPU features and shader variants are active.

method.name: set_jacobian_bypass_radius_depth_floor
method.description: Enables or disables bypassing the radius-depth floor in the Jacobian projection. Diagnostic toggle for investigating radial stretching artifacts.

method.name: get_jacobian_bypass_radius_depth_floor
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the Jacobian radius-depth floor bypass is active.

method.name: set_jacobian_bypass_j_col2_clamp
method.description: Enables or disables bypassing the J column-2 clamp in the Jacobian projection. Diagnostic toggle for investigating distortion artifacts.

method.name: get_jacobian_bypass_j_col2_clamp
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the J column-2 clamp bypass is active.

method.name: set_jacobian_invert_j_col2_sign
method.description: Enables or disables inverting the sign of J column-2 in the Jacobian projection. Diagnostic toggle for investigating mirroring artifacts.

method.name: get_jacobian_invert_j_col2_sign
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if J column-2 sign inversion is active.

method.name: set_max_conic_aspect
method.description: Sets the maximum conic aspect ratio allowed for projected splat ellipses. Limits extreme elongation from oblique viewing angles.

method.name: get_max_conic_aspect
method.description: Returns the current maximum conic aspect ratio.

method.name: set_debug_preview_mode
method.description: Sets the debug preview visualization mode for the rendered output.

method.name: get_debug_preview_mode
method.description: Returns the current debug preview mode.

method.name: get_runtime_diagnostic_snapshot
method.description: Returns a dictionary containing a comprehensive snapshot of current runtime state for diagnostic purposes, including buffer states, pipeline configuration, and error conditions.

method.name: get_tile_renderer
method.description: Returns the internal TileRenderer instance used by this renderer for tile-based rasterization.

members.member: The GaussianData resource to render. Assigning a new resource triggers GPU buffer reallocation.
The PainterlyMaterial resource configuring brush textures and stylization parameters.
The rendering mode: 3D ellipsoids, 2D surfels, or hybrid automatic selection.
Global opacity multiplier applied to all splats. Range is 0.0 to 1.0.
When enabled, sort results are cached and reused when the camera has not moved.
When enabled, the previous frame's render output is reused when the scene is unchanged.
The interactive visual state controlling editor feedback effects.
Enables level-of-detail culling of small or distant splats.
LOD bias multiplier. Higher values keep more splats visible at distance.
Minimum projected screen size in pixels below which splats are culled.
Maximum distance from camera beyond which splats are culled.
Importance culling threshold. Splats below this value are discarded.
Multiplier for splat bounding radius during frustum culling.
Extra slack added to frustum planes to reduce popping at screen edges.
Near-plane culling tolerance.
Far-plane culling tolerance.
Screen radius in pixels below which splats are culled.
When enabled, nearly transparent splats are culled earlier.
Opacity threshold below which splats are discarded during opacity-aware culling.
Enables progressive distance-based culling.
Distance at which progressive distance culling begins.
Maximum fraction of splats culled at the far end of the distance range.
When enabled, tile overflow limits are automatically tuned based on runtime performance.
Hard limit on visible splats per frame. Excess splats are culled by importance.
Enables frustum culling of splats outside the camera view.
Enables the painterly post-processing pass for stylized brush-stroke effects.
Uses cheaper shader variants for the painterly pass.
Enables the brush stroke overlay pass.
Internal render resolution scale for the painterly pass (0.25 to 1.0).
Edge detection sensitivity for painterly stroke placement.
Intensity of edge lines in the painterly output.
Length of brush strokes in pixels.
Opacity of brush strokes in the painterly overlay.
Gamma correction for the painterly output.
Shows the tile grid debug overlay.
Shows the per-tile density heatmap overlay.
Shows the performance HUD overlay.
Shows the GPU residency HUD overlay.
Shows the tile bounds debug overlay.
Shows the splat coverage debug overlay.
Highlights tiles that exceeded their splat capacity.
Highlights splats with projection anomalies.
Overrides all splat colors with white for geometry inspection.
Visualizes the shadow opacity channel as grayscale.
Visualizes the resolve pass input texture.
Visualizes the resolve pass output texture.
Visualizes GPU device submission boundaries.
Visualizes internal texture resource states.
Compute rasterization policy override (0=Default, 1=ForceOn, 2=ForceOff).
Dumps GPU performance counters to the log each frame.
Enables pipeline trace recording for performance analysis.
Enables runtime state invariant validation.
Enables per-frame GPU buffer auditing.
Number of splats sampled per audit pass.
Opacity of debug overlay visualizations.
Raises the minimum alpha of accumulated contributions for a more opaque appearance.
Minimum alpha floor for solid coverage mode.
Debug preview visualization mode for the rendered output.

constants.constant: 2D surfel (oriented disc) rendering using surface normals.
Automatic selection between 3D and 2D modes based on splat data.
Default visual state with no interactive feedback.
Hovered state with a subtle highlight effect.
Selected state with an outline effect.
Disabled state with muted visual appearance.
Point cloud visualization showing splat centers.
Depth buffer visualization as a grayscale gradient.
Heatmap visualization of per-pixel splat density.
Highlights splats that have runtime modifications applied.
